                                                                            51.Speaker 0: Mothers. Commiserations. This place is my mother. Its teats are copper. Its milk is barrel-aged.

                                                                                                  224.Speaker 0: Father said, ordered, commanded. Don't say it, don't say it! The cage. Her cage.

                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: be438c5e-a44b-c033-f4fb-568e3f506315Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: haa637c6fg7488g465fg92e6g497cf0daf315Text UUID: 02dd19b1-79fa-4d55-91cd-a4f01e76349bGroup ID: 99c8b008-5eab-218e-3e0f-413385e07e21Group Index: 1
                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                    40.Speaker 0: Talk and... perish, die, buried. Buried in Thorm tomb. Father told me.note: The Brewer drinks once more after speaking. He then lets out a deep, unsteady groan.

                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2abb297d-b1cd-1098-00bf-c54fadd94afdSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h76b53b95gfe5eg448fg80e9gcecf34ae5031Text UUID: 4f78fbf9-c795-48d5-b871-208324faac60Group ID: 99c8b008-5eab-218e-3e0f-413385e07e21Group Index: 2
                                                                                                    • •
                                                                                                      140.Speaker 0: I can't perish - no, nay, neither. Too strong, too... [End]note: The brewer groans in pain, then explodes in a shower of gore.TWN_Distillery_State_PeacefulResolution

                                                                                            254.Narrator: *The third drink is too much. You're spinning down a black maelstrom toward the heart of oblivion. All goes dark.*note: (Cine) The player collapses to the floor, unconscious. e96d7fc6-1b8c-da21-4777-4f1471441ed3_Drinkoncee96d7fc6-1b8c-da21-4777-4f1471441ed3_DrinktwiceTWN_Distillery_Event_DrankThrice

                                                                  285.Narrator: *The second drink hits you even harder. Nausea overwhelms you and it takes dire effort not to throw up all over the floor.*note: Player grimaces and sways a little in reaction to the alcohol they just drank.e96d7fc6-1b8c-da21-4777-4f1471441ed3_Drinkoncee96d7fc6-1b8c-da21-4777-4f1471441ed3_DrinktwiceTWN_Distillery_Event_DrankTwice

                                                  61.Speaker 0: A horror I can hardly bear, tolerate, endure, if only in my mind. Such daring!

                                                  147.Speaker 0: I am Thorm. My father's tower grazed the new moon. Yours means zero, nothing, naught.

                                                  110.Speaker 0: Treasures in the dark, like the dusty anniversary bottle forgotten in the widow's cellar. Delightful. Delicious.

                                                  58.Speaker 0: Bowels? Speak not of bowels. My guts are a firestorm - but I have the means to douse it.

                                                184.Success

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: RollResultUUID: 9a469353-85bd-6488-7dcf-75bbe799293dSuccess: True
                                                • +
                                                  112.Speaker 0: A deal most sordid for powers profane. To sign away your very self... Compelling.

                                                  Metadata

                                            119.Speaker 0: Ah. Elixir. But such a small sip you take... Fear not. You will soon quaff as I do.note: Brewer drinks deeply before speaking.e96d7fc6-1b8c-da21-4777-4f1471441ed3_OneDrinkServed
